levels.motivazione: RESONANCE Call Wall with massive Open Interest across all expirations: 0DTE (5.8k), WEEKLY (16.7k), and MONTHLY (38.4k). Heavy dealer short gamma exposure creates an impenetrable ceiling.
RESONANCE Put Wall with extreme structural support: WEEKLY (56k OI), MONTHLY (22k OI), and 0DTE (8.7k OI). Prioritized due to negative total GEX and bearish skew.
CONFLUENCE Put Wall with heavy structural backing in the MONTHLY (55k OI) and WEEKLY (15k OI) expirations. Acts as a deep institutional anchor.
0DTE Max Pain level less than 1% from spot. Represents the intrinsic market maker target for today's expiration, exerting a strong magnetic pull.
Massive MONTHLY Put Wall with nearly 78k OI. Serves as the ultimate structural floor and institutional defensive boundary for the current series.
0DTE Gamma Flip level (714.84) aligning with high Call OI. Marks the critical threshold where dealer positioning shifts, suppressing volatility above this zone.
Intense 0DTE spot friction with extreme volume on both Calls (76k) and Puts (88k). Indicates severe price pinning and localized intraday chop.
